brand_identity.name: SweetNest
brand_identity.vibe: Warm, premium, traditional sweets brand; Minimal + elegant UI; Soft shadows + rounded cards; 3D with motion graphics

layout_and_spacing.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8

motion_and_3d.hero_directives: Implement a 2.5D parallax hero section using Framer Motion. The brand logo should be centered. Create 'floating' sweets around the logo using layered images with subtle slow translations (e.g. y: [0, -15, 0], duration: 4-6s, repeat: Infinity, ease: 'easeInOut'). Add slight mouse-movement tracking for the parallax effect.
motion_and_3d.hover_states: Product cards must slightly lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow (shadow-xl) on hover. Images within cards should subtle scale (scale-105).
motion_and_3d.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up for grid items (initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 }).

components.navbar: Glassmorphism effect over the cream background (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5E6B8]/80). Logo top-left. Desktop nav links and Cart icon on right. Sticky top.
components.hero_section: Centered layout. Large logo. Floating sweets scattered in the background. Tagline in Cormorant Garamond below the logo.
components.product_card: Solid surface (#FAF6EA), rounded-2xl, soft shadow-md. Image container 16:9 or 1:1 ratio. Title (h3, serif), Price (sans, bold). Weight selector (250g, 500g, 1kg) as segmented pill buttons. 'Add to Cart' solid primary button (#5C1A0B bg, #F5E6B8 text).
components.cart_drawer: Slide-over from right. Solid #FAF6EA background. List of items with quantity controls (+/-). Total summary. Massive 'Order via WhatsApp' CTA button (bg-[#5C1A0B] or WhatsApp green depending on contrast preference, but keep within brand).
components.admin_dashboard: Clean, dense 'Control Room' layout. Use #F5E6B8 as base, #FAF6EA for cards. Sidebar navigation. Tables for orders and products.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the brand palette (#F5E6B8 for backgrounds, #5C1A0B for text/CTAs). Do not introduce purple or teal.
Use Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body text.
Implement the 3D parallax hero using Framer Motion. Center the provided logo. Do NOT redesign or alter the logo.
Implement the Cart drawer with quantity controls and a 'Order via WhatsApp' CTA. No payment gateway integration is required.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for testing.
Use Shadcn UI for the Admin dashboard, modifying the classes to fit the brand theme.
Ensure images are wrapped appropriately so they look premium and are responsive (object-cover).
